full_text:
Yu Mi 于麋
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yu Mi (于麋). An officer of Liu Yao. Defeated in a duel with Sun Ce and died. Yu Mi was affiliated with Liu Yao. Yu Mi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
